Package com.bonitasoft.engine.api

Interface BusinessDataAPI

All Superinterfaces:
BusinessDataAPI
public interface BusinessDataAPI extends BusinessDataAPI
BusinessDataAPI extends the community BusinessDataAPI and adds data retention configuration management capabilities.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DataRetentionConfig
    createDataRetentionConfig(String dataClassname, ReferenceDate referenceDate, int retentionDays)
    Creates a new data retention rule for the given BDM object type.
    void
    deleteDataRetentionConfig(long id)
    Deletes the data retention rule identified by the given id.
    List<DataRetentionConfig>
    getDataRetentionConfigs()
    Returns all data retention rules currently configured.
    DataRetentionConfig
    updateDataRetentionConfig(long id, ReferenceDate referenceDate, int retentionDays)
    Updates the data retention rule identified by the given id.

    Methods inherited from interface org.bonitasoft.engine.api.BusinessDataAPI

    getProcessBusinessDataReference, getProcessBusinessDataReferences

  • Method Details

    • createDataRetentionConfig

      DataRetentionConfig createDataRetentionConfig(String dataClassname, ReferenceDate referenceDate, int retentionDays) throws AlreadyExistsException, CreationException
      Creates a new data retention rule for the given BDM object type.
      Parameters:
      dataClassname - the fully qualified Java class name of the BDM object type
      referenceDate - the date field used as the starting point for the retention calculation
      retentionDays - the retention period in days. Must be a positive integer; zero or negative values are not valid and will result in a CreationException.
      Returns:
      the created DataRetentionConfig
      Throws:
      AlreadyExistsException - if a retention rule already exists for the given BDM class name
      CreationException - if the retention rule cannot be created

    • getDataRetentionConfigs

      List<DataRetentionConfig> getDataRetentionConfigs()
      Returns all data retention rules currently configured.
      Returns:
      a list of all DataRetentionConfig, or an empty list if none exist

    • updateDataRetentionConfig

      DataRetentionConfig updateDataRetentionConfig(long id, ReferenceDate referenceDate, int retentionDays) throws NotFoundException, UpdateException
      Updates the data retention rule identified by the given id.
      Parameters:
      id - the identifier of the retention rule to update
      referenceDate - the new reference date
      retentionDays - the new retention period in days. Must be a positive integer; zero or negative values are not valid and will result in an UpdateException.
      Returns:
      the updated DataRetentionConfig
      Throws:
      NotFoundException - if no retention rule exists with the given id
      UpdateException - if the retention rule cannot be updated

    • deleteDataRetentionConfig

      void deleteDataRetentionConfig(long id) throws NotFoundException, DeletionException
      Deletes the data retention rule identified by the given id.
      Parameters:
      id - the identifier of the retention rule to delete
      Throws:
      NotFoundException - if no retention rule exists with the given id
      DeletionException - if the retention rule cannot be deleted
